CustomField.description: My integration errors indicator used for download criteria.
CustomField.formula: IF($User.Id=SMAX_PS_WorkOrder__r.SVMXC__Group_Member__r.SVMXC__Salesforce_User__r.Id, TRUE, FALSE) || IF($User.Id=SMAX_PS_WorkDetail__r.CreatedById, TRUE, FALSE) || IF($User.Id=SMAX_PS_PartsOrder__r.CreatedById, TRUE, FALSE)
CustomField.label: My Integration Errors
